item.label: Implement lifecycle tracking for proposals and jobs
item.summary: Add lifecycle.py with Job/Proposal status tracking, history, and rollback capability

body:
# Description

Implement lifecycle tracking for long-running knowledge operations (proposals, jobs).

1. **lifecycle.py** module with:
   - Job class: id, status, created_at, updated_at, history
   - Proposal class: id, kind, payload, status (pending/approved/rejected/applied), history
   - Status transitions with validation
   - History tracking (who, when, what changed)
   - Rollback capability for failed jobs

2. **Integration**:
   - Hook into bootstrap/sync operations
   - Track proposal lifecycle (created → approved → applied)
   - Track job lifecycle (queued → running → completed/failed)

3. **Persistence**:
   - Store in .audiagentic/knowledge/runtime_data/lifecycle.jsonl (event log style)
   - Load on startup for resume capability

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] lifecycle.py created with Job/Proposal classes
- [ ] Status transitions validated (e.g., can't go from completed → running)
- [ ] History tracking works (each change recorded with timestamp, actor)
- [ ] Rollback logic implemented for failed jobs
- [ ] Tests demonstrate lifecycle state machine
- [ ] Persistence layer works (write/read lifecycle events)
- [ ] CLI or API to query job/proposal status

# Notes

Start simple: in-memory state machine + simple file persistence.
Extend later with database if needed.
Consider audit trail use case (who approved what, when).
"
